hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.env|*.env.*|*credentials.json|*.pem|*.key|*id_rsa*|*.secret) echo 'BLOCK: writing to sensitive file is not allowed' >&2; exit 2;; esac

case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in */agents/*.md|*/skills/*/SKILL.md|*/hooks/hooks.json) echo "DOC SYNC: you modified a plugin definition ($(basename "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH")). Update docs/architecture.md (agent/skill catalogue, diagrams) and docs/contributing.md if conventions changed. Bump version in .claude-plugin/plugin.json." >&2;; esac

if [ -f .prettierrc ] || [ -f .prettierrc.json ] || [ -f prettier.config.js ]; then npx prettier --write "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; elif [ -f .clang-format ]; then clang-format -i "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; elif command -v gofmt >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q '\.go$'; then gofmt -w "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q '\.go$' && command -v golangci-lint >/dev/null 2>&1; then golangci-lint run "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; elif echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(js|ts|jsx|tsx)$' && [ -f .eslintrc* ] || [ -f eslint.config.* ]; then npx eslint "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; fi
